ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code assigned to the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty managing the course */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campus where the course is offered */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission round for the course */,
  "clearly_in_atar" REAL /* ATAR score for clear entry into the course */,
  "offers_below_clearly_in_atar" TEXT /* Percentage of offers made below the clear entry ATAR */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses or requirements */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the faculty's focus areas */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean overseeing the faculty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the faculty */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the faculty */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the faculty's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the faculty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the faculty record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Student's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Student's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the student enrolled in the university */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Student's current GPA */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission round process */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the admission round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the admission round */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Fee required for application */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the round is currently open for applications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the round record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the round record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the campus */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the campus */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the campus */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the campus's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campus record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campus record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_statistics" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer statistic record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the offers pertain to */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round in which the offers were made */,
  "offer_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of offers made for the course in the specific round */,
  "average_atar" REAL /* Average ATAR score of students offered a place */,
  "accepted_offers" INTEGER /* Number of accepted offers */,
  "rejected_offers" INTEGER /* Number of rejected offers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offer statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offer statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_statistics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_statistics_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
